headline: EXCLUSIVE: Alphabet’s Empire Could Be Worth More In Pieces, Jay Woods Says
summary: Spinning off business units for companies can unlock shareholder value. Market expert Jay Woods shares his favorite spinoff potential name.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices Keep Rising On Iran News After Samsung Fans AI Fears
summary: The Nasdaq led the stock market lower Tuesday, as Samsung earnings slammed AI names. Oil prices jumped on U.S.-Iran news.

headline: Jim Cramer says it’s time to buy another aerospace stock before it takes off
summary: Over the July 4, 2026, weekend, I covered Jim Cramer's buy call on AST SpaceMobile. He was clear that it wasn’t something to flip fast. He called it a great speculative stock with a two-year money-making window. Monday morning, July 7, Cramer was back with another aerospace name, and this one ...
